prompt: Build a processor that reads from Kafka 'transactions', enriches with an external API call, and writes to 'enriched.transactions'

assertions.name: https_has_required_fields
assertions.description: $https includes connectionName, path, method, as fields

assertions.name: https_has_on_error_dlq
assertions.reason: Using 'fail' causes processor crash on API errors. Must use 'dlq' for production.

assertions.name: https_is_mid_pipeline_enrichment
assertions.description: $https stage is used for enrichment (mid-pipeline), not as final sink in this test
assertions.note: HTTPS can be used mid-pipeline for enrichment OR as a final sink stage

assertions.name: pipeline_ends_with_merge
assertions.description: Last pipeline stage is $merge (writes enriched data to Atlas)

common_mistakes.fix: Use onError='dlq' to handle errors gracefully

common_mistakes.error: HTTPS is for enrichment or sink only, NOT as a data source
common_mistakes.fix: Use $https stage mid-pipeline (enrichment) or as final sink
